message:
feat(conformance): add socket_ops conformance executors (bd-856p)

Add conformance test executors for 5 socket functions:
- socket: creates socket, verifies FD_POSITIVE, closes fd
- bind: handles invalid fd case (-1 returns -1)
- listen: handles invalid fd case
- shutdown: handles invalid fd with SHUT_RDWR
- getsockname: handles invalid fd case

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
